description_long: This set consists of four personal care containers, each with a pastel purple body and light green caps or pumps. The largest bottle features a cylindrical shape with a wide, flat base and a green screw cap, while the second largest has a similar form but is topped with a green pump dispenser. A medium-sized bottle with a pump and a smaller, squeezable tube with a flip-top cap are also present, both adorned with a floral motif. The labels display the brand name 'LIS ROSE COSMETIQUE' and are decorated with pink and white lilies and green leaves. The containers are made of smooth, glossy plastic and are designed for dispensing liquid or cream products. The overall aesthetic is feminine and floral, suitable for a beauty or personal care product line.
description: A group of four pastel purple personal care bottles and tubes with green caps, floral graphics, and 'LIS ROSE COSMETIQUE' branding. The set includes pump, screw, and flip-top closures.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four containers, with clear visibility of the floral labels and 'LIS ROSE COSMETIQUE' branding.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the green pump and cap mechanisms, with partial label visibility and a better look at the tube's side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the backs of the bottles and tube, with label text and graphics largely obscured.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the pump and screw cap bottles, with minimal label or graphic detail visible.
attribute_brand_logo: LIS ROSE COSMETIQUE text logo with floral motif
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with rounded shoulders
attribute_packaging_graphics: Pink and white lilies with green leaves forming a floral motif around the label
